description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with stylish fits in their creations. They did that in this summery dress as well. Wear it with a pair of strappy flat sandals for a trip to a cafe or a Sunday brunch. Product Details Tube dress with a white bodice and multi-coloured floral printed skirt, has gathered ruffles at the front neckline and a red and white elasticated band at the back neckline, elasticated waist, half mock buttoned placket and cotton lining in the skirt with ruffles at the end which shows below the dress hemline Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M which measures 62 cm from the neckline to the hem
